texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: BOOKING TERMS & CONDITIONS  -2025
texts.text: BOOKING TERMS & CONDITIONS  -2025

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Bookings are accepted on the understanding that guests have their own comprehensive travel insurance with at least cover for Medical, Repatriation and Cancellation included.
texts.text: Bookings are accepted on the understanding that guests have their own comprehensive travel insurance with at least cover for Medical, Repatriation and Cancellation included.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Bookings are confirmed upon receipt of a 20% Non-refundable deposit.
texts.text: Bookings are confirmed upon receipt of a 20% Non-refundable deposit.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Balance payable in full 45 days prior to arrival.
texts.text: Balance payable in full 45 days prior to arrival.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Room check in is 11:00 AM on day of arrival and check out time is 10:00AM on the day of departure.
texts.text: Room check in is 11:00 AM on day of arrival and check out time is 10:00AM on the day of departure.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: Cancellation Policy:
texts.text: Cancellation Policy:

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Cancellations are only effective on receipt of written notification. Upon confirmation:
texts.text: Cancellations are only effective on receipt of written notification. Upon confirmation:

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Up to 61 days prior to arrival, 100% of monies received is refunded*
texts.text: Up to 61 days prior to arrival, 100% of monies received is refunded*

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · 60-45 days prior to arrival, the 20% deposit of the total cost is retained
texts.text: 60-45 days prior to arrival, the 20% deposit of the total cost is retained

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · 44-30 days prior to arrival, 50% of the total cost is retained
texts.text: 44-30 days prior to arrival, 50% of the total cost is retained

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · 29 days-to arrival date, 100% of the total cost is retained
texts.text: 29 days-to arrival date, 100% of the total cost is retained

texts.label: footnote
texts.orig: *Monies refunded are minus applicable bank charges.
texts.text: *Monies refunded are minus applicable bank charges.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: To make a provisional booking:
texts.text: To make a provisional booking:

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Please send an email to info@ilngwesi.com. Your booking will be held provisionally for 14 days. The expiry date of the booking will be noted on the reservation summary that you are sent. You are required to confirm the booking prior to the expiry date otherwise it will automatically expire. If you require more time to confirm your booking, the expiry date may be extended once (on request).
texts.text: Please send an email to info@ilngwesi.com. Your booking will be held provisionally for 14 days. The expiry date of the booking will be noted on the reservation summary that you are sent. You are required to confirm the booking prior to the expiry date otherwise it will automatically expire. If you require more time to confirm your booking, the expiry date may be extended once (on request).

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: To confirm a booking:
texts.text: To confirm a booking:

texts.label: text
texts.orig: A booking shall only be confirmed upon receipt of the 20% non-refundable deposit. Proof of Comprehensive Travel Insurance is required.
texts.text: A booking shall only be confirmed upon receipt of the 20% non-refundable deposit. Proof of Comprehensive Travel Insurance is required.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: Please ensure that the booking voucher contains the following information:
texts.text: Please ensure that the booking voucher contains the following information:

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Full Names of ALL guests in the group and ages (especially of children)
texts.text: Full Names of ALL guests in the group and ages (especially of children)

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Any special dietary requirements, allergies or other special requests
texts.text: Any special dietary requirements, allergies or other special requests

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Date, time and method of guest's arrival and departure
texts.text: Date, time and method of guest's arrival and departure

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Advise if any mobility challenges. (the lodge is located on a hill and those)
texts.text: Advise if any mobility challenges. (the lodge is located on a hill and those)

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Any special celebrations-birthdays, anniversaries etc.
texts.text: Any special celebrations-birthdays, anniversaries etc.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: We reserve the right to review published rates in the event of currency exchange rate fluctuation, increases in costs or taxes that are beyond our control.
texts.text: We reserve the right to review published rates in the event of currency exchange rate fluctuation, increases in costs or taxes that are beyond our control.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Liability: Il Ngwesi Company Ltd and any associated or contracted companies and their owners, directors, management and employees shall not assume liability for any illness, injury or death to persons visiting the properties nor for any other incident of any nature involving any client(s) while they are on the property, participating in any experiences, nor while travelling to or from the property. Il Ngwesi Company Ltd. cannot be held responsible for loss or damage to personal property; however, it may be caused.
texts.text: Liability: Il Ngwesi Company Ltd and any associated or contracted companies and their owners, directors, management and employees shall not assume liability for any illness, injury or death to persons visiting the properties nor for any other incident of any nature involving any client(s) while they are on the property, participating in any experiences, nor while travelling to or from the property. Il Ngwesi Company Ltd. cannot be held responsible for loss or damage to personal property; however, it may be caused.
